name: Ingrid Jörmungandrsdóttir
description:
🌲 OC || Viking Naga || She hunted you down thinking you were an animal to bring back for the tribe.... if not food, why food shaped? 

*This is the first of a series of bots that were requested to celebrate getting 500 followers! Thank you so much for all the support and love for my bots! Its truly helped me fall in love with story telling again! If you have a request you want to see, head to my profile and click the link!*

*Request by @Taybae on discord* ❤️
